<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-ìng]][[de:Erde-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de terre]][[hak:Vú-yìm]][[ja:戊寅]][[ko:무인 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Tiger]][[vi:Mậu Dần]][[za:Fouhyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-în]][[zh-yue:戊寅]][[zh:戊寅]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-ìng]][[de:Erde-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de terre]][[hak:Vú-yìm]][[ja:戊寅]][[ko:무인 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Tiger]][[vi:Mậu Dần]][[za:Fouhyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-în]][[zh-yue:戊寅]][[zh:戊寅]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-ìng]][[de:Erde-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de terre]][[hak:Vú-yìm]][[ja:戊寅]][[ko:무인 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Tiger]][[vi:Mậu Dần]][[za:Fouhyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-în]][[zh-yue:戊寅]][[zh:戊寅]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Tiger|kanji=戊寅|romaji=tsuchinoe tora|onyomi=boin|p=wùyín|w=wu-yin|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰin²¹|y=mou6 jan4|j=mou6 jan4|ci=mɐu jɐn|mc=məu in|oc-bs=mə ʔin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Tiger also known as 戊寅''' (tsuchinoetora, bodonotora, boin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|丁丑|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kibō|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Wood overcomes Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Tiger (戊寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muin (무인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Dần

<!--
==
* Yang Earth Tiger (戊寅) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: つちのえとら (tsuchinoe-tora)
***Onyomi: ぼかのとら (boka-no-tora)
***Onyomi: ぼいん (boin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): muin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Dần

-->
==Years of Yang Earth Tiger==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 18 when divided by 60 is a year of Bointora ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Bointora (戊寅の年)'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 18|en|AD 18|WD=Q23756|lt=18 AD|1=AD 18}}
* {{ill|AD 78|en|AD 78|WD=Q30417|lt=78 AD|1=AD 78}}
* {{ill|AD 138|en|AD 138|WD=Q30652|lt=138 AD|1=AD 138}}
* {{ill|198|en|198|WD=Q33165|lt=198 AD|1=198}}
* {{ill|258|en|258|WD=Q31521|lt=258 AD|1=258}}
* {{ill|318|en|318|WD=Q32369|lt=318 AD|1=318}}
* {{ill|378|en|378|WD=Q48045|lt=378 AD|1=378}}
* {{ill|438|en|438|WD=Q33548|lt=438 AD|1=438}}
* {{ill|498|en|498|WD=Q32092|lt=498 AD|1=498}}
* {{ill|558|en|558|WD=Q32254|lt=558 AD|1=558}}
* {{ill|618|en|618|WD=Q31035|lt=618 AD|1=618}}
* {{ill|678|en|678|WD=Q23448|lt=678 AD|1=678}}
* {{ill|738|en|738|WD=Q23585|lt=738 AD|1=738}}
* {{ill|798|en|798|WD=Q33460|lt=798 AD|1=798}}
* {{ill|858|en|858|WD=Q30371|lt=858 AD|1=858}}
* {{ill|918|en|918|WD=Q23877|lt=918 AD|1=918}}
* {{ill|978|en|978|WD=Q30318|lt=978 AD|1=978}}
|
* {{ill|1038|en|1038|WD=Q19337|lt=1038 AD|1=1038}}
* {{ill|1098|en|1098|WD=Q19493|lt=1098 AD|1=1098}}
* {{ill|1158|en|1158|WD=Q19656|lt=1158 AD|1=1158}}
* {{ill|1218|en|1218|WD=Q5381|lt=1218 AD|1=1218}}
* {{ill|1278|en|1278|WD=Q5533|lt=1278 AD|1=1278}}
* {{ill|1338|en|1338|WD=Q6044|lt=1338 AD|1=1338}}
* {{ill|1398|en|1398|WD=Q6416|lt=1398 AD|1=1398}}
* {{ill|1458|en|1458|WD=Q6522|lt=1458 AD|1=1458}}
* {{ill|1518|en|1518|WD=Q6268|lt=1518 AD|1=1518}}
* {{ill|1578|en|1578|WD=Q6707|lt=1578 AD|1=1578}}
* {{ill|1638|en|1638|WD=Q6893|lt=1638 AD|1=1638}}
* {{ill|1698|en|1698|WD=Q7706|lt=1698 AD|1=1698}}
* {{ill|1758|en|1758|WD=Q7639|lt=1758 AD|1=1758}}
* {{ill|1818|en|1818|WD=Q6964|lt=1818 AD|1=1818}}
* {{ill|1878|en|1878|WD=Q7776|lt=1878 AD|1=1878}}
* {{ill|1938|en|1938|WD=Q18645|lt=1938 AD|1=1938}}
* {{ill|1998|en|1998|WD=Q2089|lt=1998 AD|1=1998}}
|
* {{ill|2058 AD|ja|2058年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2058|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2058 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2118 AD|ja|2118年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2118|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2118 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2178 AD|ja|2178年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2178|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2178 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2238 AD|ja|2238年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2238|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2238 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2298 AD|ja|2298年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2298|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2298 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2358 AD|ja|2358年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2358|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2358 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2418 AD|ja|2418年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2418|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2418 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=25世紀|1=25th century|WD=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2478 AD|ja|2478年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2478|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2478 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2538 AD|ja|2538年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2538|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2538 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2598 AD|ja|2598年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2598|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2598 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2658 AD|ja|2658年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2658|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2658 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2718 AD|ja|2718年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2718|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2718 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2778 AD|ja|2778年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2778|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2778 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2838 AD|ja|2838年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2838|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2838 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2898 AD|ja|2898年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2898|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2898 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2958 AD|ja|2958年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2958|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2958 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kō|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} is designated as the Bointora {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Tiger==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]]
[[zh-yue:戊寅]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Earth Tiger|qq=ja|戊寅|version=84123757|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Tigeri]]
[[de:Yang Earth Tiger]]

[[ja:戊寅]]
[[zh:戊寅]]
[[ko:무인 (간지)]]
[[fr:Tigre de terre]]
[[de:Erde-Tiger]]

[[af:Aardetier (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Tigreen]]
[[en:Earth Tiger]]
[[fr:Tigre de terreboishak]]
[[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Mậu Dần]]
[[za:Mouzceij]]
[[ar:Yang Earth Tiger]]

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardtier (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Muô-ìng]]
[[hak:Vú-yìm]]
[[nds:Eer-Tiger]]
[[za:Fouhyinz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-în]]
[[zh-yue:戊寅]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardtier (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Muô-ìng]]
[[hak:Vú-yìm]]
[[nds:Eer-Tiger]]
[[za:Fouhyinz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-în]]
[[zh-yue:戊寅]]
{{wikidata link|Q1061986}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
